payload.answer: I already have Sara recorded as your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. Please clarify whether this is the same Sara, a different Sara, or whether one of the relationships should replace the other.
citations: Existing memory: Sara is my daughter.
New input: Sara is my niece.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to Sara, who appears to be the same person as the existing Sara, but the relationship 'niece' conflicts with the existing relationship 'daughter' unless there is an unusual family circumstance.

details: No durable memory was committed because the new relationship conflicts with an existing relationship and needs clarification.

repair_options: Keep existing memory: Sara is my daughter.
Replace existing memory with: Sara is my niece.
Store both only if Sara is both your daughter and your niece due to a specific family circumstance.
Create a separate person record if this is a different Sara.
